title: Initial Test on 1 A40
author: tejassaboo

data.description: Optimizer-oriented changes inspired by constrained-optimization views of Muon and decoupled weight decay to make training dynamics and final weights more compression-friendly under the 16MB artifact limit.

novel_contributions: Single NVIDIA A40 training run for 10 minutes
Optimizer-oriented changes inspired by constrained optimization views of Muon
Decoupled weight decay to improve compression-friendliness
Reproducible snapshot of training log, code, and artifact-size metrics
